visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man with brown hair, wearing a lime green sweatshirt and dark pants, sits on a green artificial turf floor in a brightly lit room with white walls and a ceiling with multiple spotlights. He looks around with a somber expression, his hands resting on his knees as he takes in the empty space. (2) The camera cuts to a wide shot of a large, completely empty room with light-colored wooden floors and white walls. The man stands alone in the center, looking small and isolated against the backdrop of large windows on the right wall letting in flat daylight. (3) He is seen squatting in the corner of another empty white-walled room with a wooden floor. He looks despondent and tired, staring blankly ahead. The room is brightly lit with recessed ceiling lights, highlighting the lack of furniture or personal belongings in the space. (4) Back on the green artificial turf, the man sits and drinks from a silver aluminum can. In front of him is an inverted teal plastic crate, serving as a makeshift table. He looks sideways with a dejected gaze, emphasizing his lonely and impoverished fictional state. (5) In a large, empty gallery-like space with white walls and a dark floor, the man sits on a flattened brown cardboard box. He slowly lies back onto the cardboard, using it as a thin mattress on the hard floor, maintaining a mournful facial expression throughout the movement. (6) He rolls onto his side and pulls another large piece of cardboard over his body, mimicking a blanket. He is lying on the flattened cardboard box in a wide, empty white room. His posture is curled up, further illustrating the mock-tragedy of his situation. (7) The final shot is a close-up of the man lying on the cardboard bed under his cardboard blanket. He rests his head on his arm and looks directly at the camera with an exaggeratedly sad pout and wide eyes, appealing to the viewer's pity.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV：當公司被收購 又被老婆趕出門

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in various empty rooms
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young man with light brown hair, wearing a lime green sweatshirt and baggy dark grey cargo pants with white and black sneakers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions between several empty indoor spaces: a room with bright green artificial turf, a large minimalist room with light wood floors and large windows, and a sterile white room where the character eventually sleeps on cardboard.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio features a melancholic Japanese acoustic song with a male vocalist. The singer's voice is soft, breathy, and filled with emotional longing. He is accompanied by a gently strummed acoustic guitar and a faint, high-pitched piano melody that creates a somber and reflective atmosphere. (2) The acoustic track continues uninterrupted throughout the video. There are no sudden sound effects, transitions, or ambient environmental noises. The music maintains a slow, steady tempo around 80 BPM, emphasizing a consistent mood of sadness and isolation that perfectly underscores the visual narrative of the man's plight.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Scene 1 -> Scene 2 -> Scene 3 -> Scene 4 -> Scene 5 -> Scene 6 -> Scene 7
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous 'POV' scenario to depict a man who has supposedly lost everything after his company was acquired and he was kicked out by his wife. He is shown wandering and eventually sleeping on cardboard in various empty rooms. The sad Japanese acoustic music creates a satirical contrast with the modern, clean surroundings, emphasizing a comedic take on his failure.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A comedic skit using minimalist empty office and residential spaces to visually represent a mock-tragic life event.
